content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年05月19日 周二
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [vercel-labs/zero](https://github.com/vercel-labs/zero)
   The programming language for agents | ⭐2320
2. [DenisSergeevitch/agents-best-practices](https://github.com/DenisSergeevitch/agents-best-practices)
   Provider-neutral Agent Skill for Codex, Claude Code, and agentic harness design. | ⭐818
3. [Doorman11991/smallcode](https://github.com/Doorman11991/smallcode)
   AI coding agent optimized for small LLMs. 87% benchmark with 4B-active model. | ⭐531
4. [shannhk/hermes-agent-control-room](https://github.com/shannhk/hermes-agent-control-room)
   Control Room-first template for managing Hermes agents from one VPS agent to spe | ⭐356
5. [agentic-in/elephant-agent](https://github.com/agentic-in/elephant-agent)
   Personal-Model First Self Evolving AI Agent 🐘 | ⭐317
6. [AbhishekK130804/Claude-Mythos-AI-Anthropic-App](https://github.com/AbhishekK130804/Claude-Mythos-AI-Anthropic-App)
   Claude pro free Mythos design Opus Cowork  Sonnet AI Anthropic App: download fre | ⭐290
7. [LiuMengxuan04/shushu-internship-tool](https://github.com/LiuMengxuan04/shushu-internship-tool)
   把岗位描述变项目，把项目变简历，把简历变面试。 | ⭐172
8. [agent-quality-controls/slopless](https://github.com/agent-quality-controls/slopless)
   Deterministic textlint rules and CLI for catching prose slop in Markdown | ⭐152

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
